rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF HENRY NICHOLAS ZOLLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Production Of Disposition Documents.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Donna Castro and American Cancer Society's motion to compel further responses to production of documents at deposition is granted. The Court finds good cause to order disclosure of documents that are subject to qualified attorney work product protection, pursuant to CCP Section 2018.030(b). Counsel may redact portions of documents that are absolutely privileged as defined by CCP 2018.030(a). Counsel for the Christie Fraser is ordered to produce responsive documents within 14 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
